name: Intelligent Documentation Engine
description: AI-powered doc engine using multi-agent architecture. Scanner detects changes, Analyzer plans sections, Builder generates docs via Claude API, Reviewer validates and persists hashes.

lead-orchestrator.description: Lead orchestrator: coordinates 4-phase pipeline with skip-if-no-changes efficiency, quality gates, and idempotent hash persistence.

scanner.description: Phase 1: Scans source directories, computes SHA-256 hashes, detects changed files, writes research/{name}_scan_report.yaml

analyzer.description: Phase 2: Reads scan report, plans doc sections and version bump type, writes plans/{name}_doc_plan.yaml

builder.description: Phase 3: Calls Claude API, assigns semantic version, writes versioned Word doc to output/

reviewer.description: Phase 4: Validates doc completeness, persists hashes to hash_store/ ONLY on PASS (idempotency), writes testscripts/{name}_validation_report.yaml

devils-advocate.description: Gate 2: Challenges the doc plan for completeness and validity. FAIL is a hard block on Phase 3.

peer-reviewer.description: Gate 3: Reviews the generated document for quality and completeness. FAIL blocks Phase 4 and hash persistence.

phase1.name: Research (Scan)
phase1.description: Scan source files, compute SHA-256 hashes, detect changes
phase1.gate: GATE 1: If no changes → STOP (no API cost). Else → proceed to Phase 2.

phase2.name: Planning
phase2.description: Plan which sections to generate, determine version bump type
phase2.gate: GATE 2: Devil's advocate must PASS before Phase 3.

phase3.name: Build
phase3.description: Generate doc via Claude API, assign version, write .docx to output/
phase3.gate: GATE 3: Peer reviewer must PASS before Phase 4.

core_philosophy.efficiency: Skip-if-no-changes: Gate 1 stops the pipeline immediately if no files changed
core_philosophy.idempotency: Hash persistence: hashes saved ONLY after Phase 4 Reviewer validates the doc
core_philosophy.reliability: Never silently swallow errors: all exceptions logged and propagated
